subject: Warp 1.09 - Error while processing CTFs
body:
Hi everyone,

We are new to WARP, and we have run into a problem while making the CTF 
correction of our movies. 

When we started doing motion correction, Warp was doing fine, but when we 
tried to do the CTF, Warp started deselecting all the files. Trying to do a 
single CTF (in the Fourier tab) gives an error (see image attached) 

We tried playing with the parameters, but it always gives the same error. 
For reference, we want to use (and have used) the following CTF parameters:

Window: 512 px
Range: 30-5 A
Voltage: 300kV
Cs: 2.7 mm
Amplitude: 0.1
Defocus: 0 - -5 um

Kind regards,

Ivan
